examples: I want have an uncrowded house for my family.
You should give others their personal space in an uncrowded elevator.
In a pleasant, uncrowded public school in a prosperous suburb -- actually a decommissioned building in Portland, Ore.
This year, I went for the more sedate environs of Tulum, a nice uncrowded beach with perfect turquoise water (and a beachside Maya ruin).
